description_long: This house features a prominent gable roof with dark shingles and a large wooden deck extending from the front. The structure incorporates a mix of wood and concrete, with a partially covered porch area supported by wooden beams and slats, providing both shade and architectural interest. The facade includes a combination of horizontal and vertical window arrangements, with a notable overhang above the main entryway. The rear of the house is more enclosed, with fewer windows and a solid wall, while the side reveals a secondary roof section and additional windows. The overall design is modern with rustic elements, blending natural wood textures with clean lines. The house appears to be a single-story dwelling with a spacious outdoor living area.
description: A modern single-story house with a large gable roof, wooden deck, and a partially covered porch, featuring a mix of wood and concrete materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large wooden deck, partially covered porch with slatted roof, and main entryway under a gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the deck, the overhanging roof, and the supporting concrete base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a more enclosed facade with fewer windows and the continuation of the gable roof.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the wooden slatted porch cover, the expansive deck, and the overall roof structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, wooden slats, and a prominent overhang supported by beams.
